es.title: Noticias Diarias: Copyright e Inteligencia Artificial
es.subtitle: Lo último en leyes de derechos de autor para músicos, compositores y productores.

sections.title: La Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos se pronuncia sobre el caso de derechos de autor de AI
sections.content: En un fallo reciente, la Corte Suprema de los Estados Unidos ha decidido que las obras creadas con la ayuda de inteligencia artificial no son elegibles para la protección de derechos de autor. Esta decisión ha generado un gran debate en la industria musical, ya que muchos artistas y productores han comenzado a utilizar la IA para crear música.

sections.title: La empresa de música Amper Music lanza una plataforma de licencias para obras de AI
sections.content: La empresa de música Amper Music ha lanzado una plataforma de licencias para obras de inteligencia artificial, lo que permite a los productores y compositores obtener permisos para utilizar obras de AI en sus proyectos. Esta plataforma es una de las primeras en ofrecer una solución para el problema de los derechos de autor en la música generada por IA.

sections.title: Guía del día: Cómo registrar tus obras de AI
sections.content: Para registrar tus obras de AI, es importante que sigas los siguientes pasos: primero, asegúrate de que la obra sea original y no sea una copia de otra obra existente. Luego, debes determinar si la obra es elegible para la protección de derechos de autor. Finalmente, debes registrar la obra en la oficina de derechos de autor correspondiente, como la Oficina de Derechos de Autor de los Estados Unidos.

en.title: Daily News: Copyright & Artificial Intelligence
en.subtitle: The latest in copyright law for musicians, composers, and producers.

sections.title: US Supreme Court Rules on AI Copyright Case
sections.content: In a recent ruling, the US Supreme Court has decided that works created with the help of artificial intelligence are not eligible for copyright protection. This decision has sparked a heated debate in the music industry, as many artists and producers have begun using AI to create music. Companies like Google and Amazon have also been affected by this decision, as they have been investing heavily in AI-generated music.

sections.title: Amper Music Launches AI Music Licensing Platform
sections.content: Music company Amper Music has launched a licensing platform for AI-generated music, allowing producers and composers to obtain permission to use AI-generated works in their projects. This platform is one of the first to offer a solution to the copyright problem in AI-generated music. The platform will provide a way for creators to clear the rights for AI-generated music and ensure that they are not infringing on any existing copyrights.

sections.title: Today's Guide: Registering Your AI-Generated Works
sections.content: To register your AI-generated works, follow these steps: first, ensure that the work is original and not a copy of an existing work. Next, determine if the work is eligible for copyright protection. Finally, register the work with the relevant copyright office, such as the US Copyright Office. It is also important to keep records of the creation process, including any human involvement, to help establish the work's eligibility for copyright protection.
